Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice For Failure To File Amended Complaint And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Feb-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Prior to open court Defense counsel Mr John Won appears to inform the court the continuance date is after the trial date. Counsel did not send a notice to contest and did not inform the other side of their appearance. At the instruction of the court, the clerk informs counsel the matter will not be called and the court will adopt the TR.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE's Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice For Failure To File Amended Complaint And For Entry Of Judgment.

Defendant King American Ambulance's Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice For Failure To File Amended Complaint And For Entry Of Judgment is CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 19, 2026, AT 9 AM IN THIS DEPARTMENT.

If Plaintiff has not filed an amended complaint by the next hearing date, the court will likely grant Defendant King American Ambulance's motion to dismiss action with prejudice as to King American Ambulance.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice For Failure To File Amended Complaint And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Continued To Jan-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
ZUBEDAH LYNCH self- represented plaintiff.
JOHN C. WON, Esq., of CRADDICK, CANDLAND & CONTI, Tel:(925) 838-1100 for Defendant, KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE (telephone appearance).

Hearing held: The Court did not receive any notice of contest from either party. Defense counsel appeared by phone in case the plaintiff appeared. The Plaintiff filed a declaration on November 25, 2025, requesting a continuance of the motion. In her declaration, she states that she was unable to file the amended complaint because she did not receive all the documents she needed until November 12, 2025. She further notes that the report she received was illegible and bi standard. The Plaintiff assures the Court that she now has all the necessary documents to file the amended complaint but needs additional time to organize them and prepare the filing.The matter argued/discussed. The Court reviewed the pleadings and heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court Vacates its tentatve ruling.DEFENDANT KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE's Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice For Failure To File Amended Complaint And For Entry Of Judgment is continue to January 7,2026. The Court grants an extension to file either an opposition or an amended complaint. The deadline for the amended complaint will be the same as the deadline for opposing the motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open Court Defense counsel Mr. John Won appears in an abundance of caution. At 9:01 the court releases counsel since there was no notice to contest email recvd. At 9:03 Zubedah Lynch appears and was informed of the court's tentative ruling and given information for the state bar.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant King American Ambulance's demurrer to the first amended complaint is OVERULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
